image.title: NAC Schwartz, Y Oster, C Slama, S Benenson, NA

item.title: A Dynamic Response to Exposures of Health Care Workers to Newly Diagnosed COVID-19 Patients or Hospital Personnel, in Order to Minimize Cross-Transmission and the Need for Suspension From Work During the Outbreak.
